name: Fresh Apple Muffins-
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the margarine and sugar replacement in a bowl.
2. Add the beaten egg to the mixture and stir well.
3. Gradually add the remaining ingredients, stirring until just combined.
4. Fill greased muffin tins no more than two-thirds full with the batter.
5. Bake at 400°F for 25 minutes, or until done.
6. For those who like spices, you may add cinnamon, nutmeg, ginger, and cloves to the mix – just a dash of each.
Yield: 12 muffins
Serving size: 1 muffin
Calories per serving: 72
